 991→    private fun currentIndent() =
 992→        indentContextStack
 993→            .peekLast()
 994→            .indent()
 995→
 996→    private fun startIndentContext(
 997→        fromAstNode: ASTNode,
 998→        toAstNode: ASTNode = fromAstNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 999→        nodeIndent: String = currentIndent(),
1000→        childIndent: String = indentConfig.indent,
1001→        firstChildIndent: String = childIndent,
1002→        lastChildIndent: String = childIndent,
1003→        activated: Boolean = false,
1004→    ): IndentContext =
1005→        IndentContext(
1006→            fromASTNode = fromAstNode,
1007→            toASTNode = toAstNode,
1008→            nodeIndent = nodeIndent,
1009→            firstChildIndent = firstChildIndent,
1010→            childIndent = childIndent,
1011→            lastChildIndent = lastChildIndent,
1012→            activated = activated,
1013→        ).also { newIndentContext ->
1014→            LOGGER.trace {
1015→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.nodeIndent)
1016→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.childIndent)
1017→                "Create new indent context (same as parent) with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
1018→                    "${fromAstNode.elementType}: ${newIndentContext.nodes}"
1019→            }
1020→            indentContextStack.addLast(newIndentContext)
1021→        }
1022→
1023→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
1024→        node: ASTNode,
1025→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1026→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1027→    ) {
1028→        while (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.toASTNode == node) {
1029→            LOGGER.trace {
1030→                val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1031→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
1032→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
1033→                "Remove indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for ${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: " +
1034→                    "${indentContext.nodes}"
1035→            }
1036→            indentContextStack
1037→                .removeLast()
1038→                .also {
1039→                    LOGGER.trace {
1040→                        val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1041→                        val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
1042→                        val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
1043→                        "Last indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
1044→                            "${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: ${indentContext.nodes}"
1045→                    }
1046→                }
1047→        }
1048→    }
1049→
1050→    override fun afterLastNode() {
1051→        require(indentContextStack.isEmpty()) {
1052→            indentContextStack
1053→                .joinToString(prefix = "Stack should be empty:\n\t", separator = "\n\t") { it.toString() }
1054→        }
1055→    }
1056→
1057→    private fun visitNewLineIndentation(
1058→        node: ASTNode,
1059→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1060→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1061→    ) {
1062→        if (node.ignoreIndent()) {
1063→            return
1064→        }
1065→
1066→        val normalizedNodeIndent = node.normalizedIndent(emit)
1067→        val expectedIndentation = node.expectedIndent()
1068→        val text = node.text
1069→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1070→        if (nodeIndent != normalizedNodeIndent || normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1071→            if (normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1072→                emit(
1073→                    node.startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1074→                    "Unexpected indentation (${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) (should be ${expectedIndentation.length})",
1075→                    true,
1076→                )
1077→            } else {
1078→                // Indentation was at correct level but contained invalid indent characters. This violation has already
1079→                // been emitted.
1080→            }
1081→            LOGGER.trace {
1082→                "Line $line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "changed indentation to ${expectedIndentation.length} " +
1083→                    "(from ${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}"
1084→            }
1085→            if (autoCorrect) {
1086→                (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1087→                    text.substringBeforeLast("\n") + "\n" + expectedIndentation,
1088→                )
1089→            }
1090→        } else {
1091→            node.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1092→        }
1093→    }
1094→
1095→    private fun ASTNode.ignoreIndent(): Boolean {
1096→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
1097→        if (text.endsWith("\n") && nextLeaf.isStartOfRawStringLiteral()) {
1098→            processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1099→            return true // raw strings (""") are allowed at column 0
1100→        }
1101→
1102→        nextLeaf
1103→            ?.parent(strict = false) { it.psi is PsiComment }
1104→            ?.let { comment ->
1105→                if (text.endsWith("\n")) {
1106→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1107→                    return true // comments are allowed at column 0
1108→                }
1109→                if (comment.textContains('\n') && comment.elementType == BLOCK_COMMENT) {
1110→                    // FIXME: while we cannot assume any kind of layout inside a block comment,
1111→                    // `/*` and `*/` can still be indented
1112→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1113→                    return true
1114→                }
1115→            }
1116→        return false
1117→    }
1118→
1119→    private fun ASTNode?.isStartOfRawStringLiteral(): Boolean = this != null && this.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE && this.text == "\"\"\""
1120→
1121→    private fun ASTNode.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded() =
1122→        LOGGER.trace { "No indentation change required for $elementType: ${textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
1123→
1124→    private fun ASTNode.expectedIndent(): String {
1125→        val lastIndexContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1126→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
1127→        val adjustedChildIndent =
1128→            when {
1129→                this == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ||
1130→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ->
1131→                    lastIndexContext.firstChildIndent
1132→
1133→                this == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ||
1134→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ->
1135→                    lastIndexContext.lastChildIndent
1136→
1137→                else -> lastIndexContext.childIndent
1138→            }
1139→        return lastIndexContext.nodeIndent + adjustedChildIndent
1140→    }
1141→
1142→    private fun ASTNode.normalizedIndent(emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit): String {
1143→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1144→        return when (indentConfig.indentStyle) {
1145→            SPACE -> {
1146→                if ('\t' in nodeIndent) {
1147→                    emit(
1148→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1149→                        "Unexpected tab character(s)",
1150→                        true,
1151→                    )
1152→                    indentConfig.toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndent)
1153→                } else {
1154→                    nodeIndent
1155→                }
1156→            }
1157→
1158→            TAB -> {
1159→                val acceptableTrailingSpaces = acceptableTrailingSpaces()
1160→                val nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces = nodeIndent.removeSuffix(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1161→                if (' ' in nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces) {
1162→                    emit(
1163→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1164→                        "Unexpected space character(s)",
1165→                        true,
1166→                    )
1167→                    indentConfig
1168→                        .toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces)
1169→                        .plus(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1170→                } else {
1171→                    nodeIndent
1172→                }
1173→            }
1174→        }
1175→    }
1176→
1177→    private fun visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(
1178→        node: ASTNode,
1179→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1180→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1181→    ) {
1182→        if (!this::stringTemplateIndenter.isInitialized) {
1183→            stringTemplateIndenter = StringTemplateIndenter(codeStyle, indentConfig)
1184→        }
1185→        stringTemplateIndenter.visitClosingQuotes(currentIndent(), node.treeParent, autoCorrect, emit)
1186→    }
1187→
1188→    private fun ASTNode?.isElvisOperator() =
1189→        this != null &&
1190→            elementType == OPERATION_REFERENCE &&
1191→            firstChildNode?.elementType == ELVIS
1192→
1193→    private fun ASTNode.acceptableTrailingSpaces(): String {
1194→        require(elementType == WHITE_SPACE)
1195→        val acceptableTrailingSpaces =
1196→            when (nextLeaf()?.elementType) {
1197→                KDOC_LEADING_ASTERISK, KDOC_END -> {
1198→                    // The indentation of a KDoc comment contains a space as the last character regardless of the indentation
1199→                    // style (tabs or spaces) except for the starting line of the KDoc comment
1200→                    KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1201→                }
1202→
1203→                TYPE_CONSTRAINT -> {
1204→                    // 6 spaces (length of "where" keyword plus a separator space) to indent type constraints as below:
1205→                    //    where A1 : RecyclerView.Adapter<V1>,
1206→                    //               A1 : ComposableAdapter.ViewTypeProvider,
1207→                    TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1208→                }
1209→
1210→                else -> ""
1211→            }
1212→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1213→        return if (nodeIndent.endsWith(acceptableTrailingSpaces)) {
1214→            return acceptableTrailingSpaces
1215→        } else {
1216→            ""
1217→        }
1218→    }
1219→
1220→    private fun startNoIndentZone(node: ASTNode) =
1221→        IndentContext(
1222→            fromASTNode = node,
1223→            nodeIndent = "",
1224→            firstChildIndent = "",
1225→            childIndent = "",
1226→            lastChildIndent = "",
1227→            activated = true,
1228→        )
1229→
1230→    private companion object {
1231→        const val KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT = " "
1232→        const val TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT = "      " // Length of keyword "where" plus separating space
1233→        val CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION = setOf(DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION, SAFE_ACCESS_EXPRESSION)
1234→    }
1235→
1236→    private data class IndentContext(
1237→        /**
1238→         * The node on which the indent context starts.
1239→         */
1240→        val fromASTNode: ASTNode,
1241→        /**
1242→         * The node at which the indent context ends. If null, then the context ends at the last child leaf of the node
1243→         * on which the indent context starts.
1244→         */
1245→        val toASTNode: ASTNode = fromASTNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
1246→        /**
1247→         * Cumulative indentation for the node. Normally this should be equal to a multiple of the
1248→         * 'indentConfig.indentStyle' to ensure a consistent indentation style.
1249→         */
1250→        val nodeIndent: String,
1251→        /**
1252→         * Additional indentation for first child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1253→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1254→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1255→         */
1256→        val firstChildIndent: String,
1257→        /**
1258→         * Additional indentation for child nodes. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to ensure
1259→         * a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it is
1260→         * still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1261→         */
1262→        val childIndent: String,
1263→        /**
1264→         * Additional indentation for last child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1265→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1266→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1267→         */
1268→        val lastChildIndent: String,
1269→        /**
1270→         * True when the indentation level of this context is activated
1271→         */
1272→        val activated: Boolean = false,
1273→    ) {
1274→        val nodes: String
1275→            get() =
1276→                fromASTNode
1277→                    .prevLeaf() // The 'fromAstNode' itself needs to be returned by '.leaves()' call as well
1278→                    ?.leaves()
1279→                    .orEmpty()
1280→                    .takeWhile {
1281→                        // The 'toAstNode' itself needs to be included as well
1282→                        it != toASTNode.nextLeaf()
1283→                    }
1284→                    .joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
1285→                    .textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1286→
1287→        fun indent() =
1288→            if (activated) {
1289→                nodeIndent + childIndent
1290→            } else {
1291→                nodeIndent
1292→            }
1293→
1294→        fun prevCodeLeaf() = fromASTNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
1295→    }
1296→}
1297→
1298→private fun ASTNode.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline() = text.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1299→
1300→private fun String.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline(): String {
1301→    val (prefix, suffix) =
1302→        if (this.all { it.isWhitespace() }) {
1303→            Pair("[", "]")
1304→        } else {
1305→            Pair("", "")
1306→        }
1307→    return prefix
1308→        .plus(
1309→            this
1310→                .replace("\t", "\\t")
1311→                .replace("\n", "\\n"),
1312→        ).plus(suffix)
1313→}
1314→
1315→private class StringTemplateIndenter(
1316→    private val codeStyle: CodeStyleValue,
1317→    private val indentConfig: IndentConfig,
1318→) {
1319→    fun visitClosingQuotes(
1320→        expectedIndent: String,
1321→        node: ASTNode,
1322→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1323→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1324→    ) {
1325→        require(node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE)
1326→        node
1327→            .let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
1328→            .takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
1329→            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
1330→            ?.let { _ ->
1331→                if (node.containsMixedIndentationCharacters()) {
1332→                    // It can not be determined with certainty how mixed indentation characters should be interpreted.
1333→                    // The trimIndent function handles tabs and spaces equally (one tabs equals one space) while the user
1334→                    // might expect that the tab size in the indentation is more than one space.
1335→                    emit(
1336→                        node.startOffset,
1337→                        "Indentation of multiline string should not contain both tab(s) and space(s)",
1338→                        false,
1339→                    )
1340→                    return
1341→                }
1342→
1343→                val prefixLength = node.getCommonPrefixLength()
1344→                val prevLeaf = node.prevLeaf()
1345→                val correctedExpectedIndent =
1346→                    if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isRawStringLiteralReturnInFunctionBodyBlock()) {
1347→                        // Allow:
1348→                        //   fun foo(): String {
1349→                        //       return """
1350→                        //           some text
1351→                        //           """.trimIndent
1352→                        //   }
1353→                        node
1354→                            .indent(false)
1355→                            .plus(indentConfig.indent)
1356→                    } else if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isRawStringLiteralFunctionBodyExpression()) {
1357→                        // Allow:
1358→                        //   fun foo(
1359→                        //       bar: String
1360→                        //   ) = """
1361→                        //       $bar
1362→                        //       """.trimIndent
1363→                        node
1364→                            .indent(false)
1365→                            .plus(indentConfig.indent)
1366→                    } else if (prevLeaf?.text == "\n") {
1367→                        // In case the opening quotes are placed at the start of the line, then the closing quotes
1368→                        // should have no indent as well.
1369→                        ""
1370→                    } else {
1371→                        expectedIndent
1372→                    }
1373→                node.children()
1374→                    .forEach {
1375→                        if (it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" &&
1376→                            (
1377→                                it.isLiteralStringTemplateEntry() ||
1378→                                    it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() ||
1379→                                    it.isClosingQuote()
1380→                            )
1381→                        ) {
1382→                            val (actualIndent, actualContent) =
1383→                                if (it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1384→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(it.text.length)
1385→                                } else if (it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() && it.isFirstNonBlankElementOnLine()) {
1386→                                    it.getFirstElementOnSameLine().text.splitIndentAt(correctedExpectedIndent.length)
1387→                                } else {
1388→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(prefixLength)
1389→                                }
1390→                            if (indentConfig.containsUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)) {
1391→                                val offsetFirstWrongIndentChar =
1392→                                    indentConfig.indexOfFirstUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)
1393→                                emit(
1394→                                    it.startOffset + offsetFirstWrongIndentChar,
1395→                                    "Unexpected '${indentConfig.unexpectedIndentCharDescription}' character(s) in margin of multiline " +
1396→                                        "string",
1397→                                    true,
1398→                                )
1399→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1400→                                    (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1401→                                        correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1402→                                    )
1403→                                }
1404→                            } else if (actualIndent != correctedExpectedIndent && it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1405→                                // It is a deliberate choice not to fix the indents inside the string literal except the line which only contains
1406→                                // the closing quotes.
1407→                                emit(
1408→                                    it.startOffset,
1409→                                    "Unexpected indent of multiline string closing quotes",
1410→                                    true,
1411→                                )
1412→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1413→                                    if (it.firstChildNode == null) {
1414→                                        (it as LeafPsiElement).rawInsertBeforeMe(
1415→                                            LeafPsiElement(REGULAR_STRING_PART, correctedExpectedIndent),
1416→                                        )
1417→                                    } else {
1418→                                        (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1419→                                            correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1420→                                        )
1421→                                    }
1422→                                }
1423→                            }
1424→                        }
1425→                    }
1426→            }
1427→    }
1428→
1429→    private fun ASTNode.isRawStringLiteralFunctionBodyExpression() =
1430→        (prevLeaf()?.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || prevLeaf()?.text == " ") &&
1431→            FUN ==
1432→            prevCodeLeaf()
1433→                .takeIf { it?.elementType == EQ }
1434→                ?.treeParent
1435→                ?.elementType
1436→
1437→    private fun ASTNode.isRawStringLiteralReturnInFunctionBodyBlock() = RETURN_KEYWORD == prevCodeLeaf()?.elementType
1438→
1439→    /**
1440→     * Get the length of the indent which is shared by all lines inside the string template except for the indent of
1441→     * the closing quotes.
1442→     */
1443→    private fun ASTNode.getCommonPrefixLength() =
1444→        children()
1445→            .filterNot { it.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE }
1446→            .filterNot { it.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE }
1447→            .filter { it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" }
1448→            .filterNot { it.text == "\n" }
1449→            .let { indents ->
1450→                val indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote =
1451→                    indents
1452→                        .filterNot { it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote() }
1453→                if (indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote.count() > 0) {
1454→                    indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote
1455→                } else {
1456→                    indents
1457→                }
1458→            }
1459→            .map { it.text.indentLength() }
1460→            .minOrNull()
